improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion: <meta name="description" content="Gideon is your AI-powered trade and business assistant. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support for operations and trade decisions. Try three free searches today."><meta property="og:title" content="Gideon – AI Trade & Business Assistant | GDN AI"><meta property="og:description" content="Your Claude-powered assistant for trade and business. Instant AI answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace access for professionals. Start with three free searches."><meta property="og:type" content="website"><meta property="og:image" content="https://gdn.ai/og-gideon-preview.png"><meta property="og:url" content="https://gdn.ai/"><meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image"><meta name="twitter:title" content="Gideon – AI Trade & Business Assistant"><meta name="twitter:description" content="Instant AI answers and professional trade support. Try Gideon free today.">
improvements.rationale: A compelling meta description under 160 characters improves click-through rates from search results by clearly communicating the value proposition. Open Graph and Twitter Card tags ensure professional, branded previews when the homepage is shared on LinkedIn, Facebook, or Twitter—critical for B2B audiences. Including the three free searches offer creates a low-friction call to action. These tags are foundational SEO elements currently missing from static HTML pages.

improvements.suggestion:
Hero Headline: "Meet Gideon — Your AI Trade & Business Assistant"

Subheading: "Get instant answers, voice chat support, and a powerful workspace built for professionals. Try three free searches today."
improvements.rationale: This headline immediately introduces the product by name while clearly stating its purpose. The subheading highlights three key value props (instant answers, voice chat, workspace) and ends with a clear, low-friction CTA that emphasizes the free trial without pressure. The copy is concise, professional, and builds trust by being specific rather than vague.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches, you'll be invited to become a member to continue accessing Gideon. Membership starts at just US$2 per day, billed monthly—or save 30% with an annual plan. As a member, you'll unlock unlimited searches, voice chat, and a dedicated workspace built for serious business and trade professionals.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the key conversion point where free users hit the paywall. By clearly explaining what happens next and immediately reinforcing the low entry price and member benefits, it reduces friction and anxiety at the decision moment, helping convert trial users into paying members.
